title: Action Cycles
summary: Action Cycles was a series of larger-scale (approximately 1:12-1:18 scale) Hot Wheels motorcycles produced from 1987 to about 1996, initially under the Hot Wheels Giants line. These were a series of Hot Wheels cars which featured clockwork motors which could be activated by pulling back and releasing, akin to many other clockwork toy cars....

title: Hot Wheels: Turbo Racing
summary: Hot Wheels Turbo Racing is a racing video game released for the Nintendo 64 and PlayStation in 1999 published by Electronic Arts and developed by Stormfront Studios. It features 40 cars based on the Hot Wheels series of toys by Mattel. It also features Kyle Petty's 1999 NASCAR stock car, as it was sponsored by Hot Wheels.
